tasks.description: Fix gap analysis Generate Summary button hidden when no gap data + add live countdown timer to rate-limited state (IMP-066)
acceptance_criteria: Generate Summary button visible even when hasGapData is false
Button is disabled with muted styling and hint text like 'Score steps to enable AI narrative' when no gap data
Button remains fully functional when gap data exists (no regression)
Rate-limited state shows live M:SS countdown timer instead of static 'about N minutes' (IMP-066 pattern from IMP-065 in ai-analysis-view.tsx)
Countdown auto-transitions to idle state when reaching 0
Regenerate button disabled during rate_limited state

patterns_to_follow: IMP-065 countdown timer pattern: formatCountdown() helper, countdown state, useEffect with setInterval(1s), auto-transition to idle at 0, display format 'Try again in M:SS'
BUG-027 fix: move Generate Summary button outside the {hasGapData && (...)} block, show disabled state when !hasGapData

tasks.special_instructions: Read ai-analysis-view.tsx to copy the exact IMP-065 countdown pattern. The NarrativeState type already has rate_limited with retryAfterSeconds — wire the countdown to that. For BUG-027: show the AI narrative section (button + results) unconditionally, but disable the Generate Summary button when !hasGapData with a tooltip/hint.

TouchpointNode export wrapped in React.memo() matching section-node.tsx line 96 pattern

Change 'export function StageNode' to 'function StageNodeInner' and add 'export const StageNode = React.memo(StageNodeInner)' — or use named function expression pattern from step-node.tsx

tasks.special_instructions: Read step-node.tsx to see the exact React.memo pattern used. Apply identically to stage-node.tsx and touchpoint-node.tsx. Minimal change — just wrap the export.

tasks.description: Sidebar improvements badge defaults to 0 on fetch error + Add as Improvement visual confirmation feedback (IMP-068)
acceptance_criteria: IMP-071: When /api/v1/improvement-ideas returns an error (500, network failure), sidebar badge shows 0 instead of blank
IMP-071: .catch() handler sets improvementsOpenCount to null (hides badge) OR 0 — choose 0 so badge renders consistently
IMP-068: After 'Add as Improvement' button is clicked and succeeds, button text changes to 'Added ✓' for 2 seconds before reverting
IMP-068: Pattern matches the Copy button in gap-analysis-view.tsx (copied state with setTimeout reset)

patterns_to_follow: IMP-071: Change .catch(() => {}) to .catch(() => { if (!cancelled) setImprovementsOpenCount(0); }) at sidebar.tsx:74
IMP-068: Copy button pattern from gap-analysis-view.tsx — useState for 'added' per suggestion index, onClick sets true + setTimeout(2000) resets to false, show Check icon + 'Added' text while true

tasks.special_instructions: IMP-071 is a one-line fix in sidebar.tsx. IMP-068 requires adding a Map<number, boolean> or Set state to track which AI suggestion 'Add as Improvement' buttons show confirmation. Read gap-analysis-view.tsx Copy button pattern (uses copied useState + setTimeout) as reference.
